title: ME No Blind
description: Solved the problem of visual fatigue that may be caused by ME controller
body:
## Let ME Controller don't make you blind.

This resource pack addresses the issue of the ME Controller's flickering effect, which may cause eye discomfort. It changes the color of the ME Controller to pink and is compatible with 1.12.x-1.19.x of AE2.

If you need other colors, you can modify the file manually.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f520062fc2eb790b299ce5c2ad51b81b386f3c7f.png)
